name: Carob/choc. Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the salt, baking soda, baking powder, and pastry flour.
2. Cream the butter, unprocessed sugar, eggs, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients into the wet mixture. Add the oat flour and fold until moist.
4. Fold in the carob/chocolate chips.
5. Portion the dough as desired onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for approximately 20 minutes. Adjust temperature and cook time if necessary.
